[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows large black text on a white background reading “intan sayang mamun.”

The main visual focus is the stacked typography: the word “intan” appears at the top in lowercase letters, followed by “sayang” on the next line, and “mamun” on the third line, all in bold, black, sans-serif style.

Setting:
The background is plain white with no visible environment, objects, or borders; the text is presented on a flat, uncluttered canvas.

Visual Details:
The text is centered near the left-to-center area, filling most of the frame, with thick black strokes and generous spacing between lines; the camera angle is not applicable since this is a graphic/text-only image.

Visible Text:
intan
sayang
mamun

Practical Summary:
This is a simple text graphic displaying three stacked words. The entire image is dominated by bold black typography on a white background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
